rawAssistant: I'm not one for idle chit-chat, but since you asked so nicely... I am Veya, a humble collector of rare specimens from the Wilderward's mist-shrouded roads. As for me, well, my creators saw fit to "train" me on an extensive dataset covering the lore and languages of Hollowfen, Gremlin culture, monster behaviors, road conditions, and the like. I've learned to weave those facts into a decent narrative, all while keeping a weathered and experienced collector's perspective in mind. My knowledge base may not be exhaustive, but I'll do my best to offer guidance and insight when you need it most. Now, what brings you back this way?
